problem id: 06412918
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  10101000 -> 00010101
  10111010 -> 01010111
  11001001 -> 00111001
  00101000 -> 00000101
  10000110 -> 11010000
  00010011 -> 01100010
  11101000 -> 00011101
  10011110 -> 11010011
  00101011 -> 01100101

query: 10010000
predicted answer: 00010010
